items.title_en: Google releases Gemma 4 open models
items.title_zh: 谷歌发布 Gemma 4 开源模型
items.summary_en: Google releases Gemma 4 open models, expanding the Gemma family with a newer generation that can be run by researchers and developers on their own hardware. This move underscores Google's push toward open, auditable AI and could accelerate experimentation outside managed cloud environments.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌发布 Gemma 4 开源模型，提供新一代可供研究者和开发者在本地硬件上运行的能力。这一举动凸显谷歌向开放、可审计的 AI 生态迈进，可能加速在自有环境中的研究与实验。

items.title_en: LinkedIn is searching your browser extensions
items.title_zh: LinkedIn 正在搜索你的浏览器扩展
items.summary_en: A report suggests LinkedIn collects data from installed browser extensions, raising privacy and data-use questions for a platform that handles professional identity and recruitment. The practice highlights tensions between data collection for service improvement and user privacy.
items.summary_zh: 有报道指 LinkedIn 会收集已安装的浏览器扩展数据，引发关于隐私和数据使用的质疑，尤其是在处理专业身份与招聘的场景中。这一做法凸显了服务改进与用户隐私之间的紧张关系。

items.title_en: The open web isn't dying, we're killing it
items.title_zh: 开放的网络并未死亡——其实是我们在扼杀它
items.summary_en: The open web isn't dying; it's being harmed by centralized platforms and friction in interoperability. The piece argues for renewed focus on open standards, privacy protections, and sustainable hosting to keep the web open.
items.summary_zh: 开放的网络并未死去，它正被集中化的平台和互操作性障碍侵蚀。文章呼吁重申开放标准、隐私保护和可持续的托管模式，以保障开放网络的韧性。

items.title_en: Tailscale's new macOS home
items.title_zh: Tailscale 的全新 macOS 应用 Home
items.summary_en: Tailscale unveils a new macOS app called Home, designed to streamline onboarding and network access on Macs. The release focuses on a native-like experience and features aimed at improving usability for Mac users, including improvements around how the app accommodates display quirks like the notch.
items.summary_zh: Tailscale 推出名为 Home 的 macOS 应用，旨在简化 Mac 的网络接入与初始配置。新应用强调原生化体验，并通过改进对显示凹槽等硬件细节的适配，提升 Mac 用户的使用便捷性。

items.title_en: Decisions that eroded trust in Azure – by a former Azure Core engineer
items.title_zh: 让 Azure 信任度受损的决策—一位前 Azure Core 工程师的看法
items.summary_en: A former Azure Core engineer details decisions that undermined customer trust, touching on feature deprecation, opaque updates, and governance friction that frustrated developers and admins. The piece reframes Azure’s evolution as a case study in cloud trust and product governance.
items.summary_zh: 一位前 Azure Core 工程师揭示削弱用户信任的决策，涉及功能弃用、更新不透明与治理摩擦等问题，令开发者和管理员感到挫败。该分析将 Azure 的演变视为云信任与产品治理的案例研究。

items.title_en: Cursor 3
items.title_zh: Cursor 3 发布
items.summary_en: Cursor 3 marks the latest release of the Cursor platform, bringing new features and performance enhancements. The update demonstrates continued maturation and competitive positioning within its software tools ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Cursor 3 作为该平台的最新版本，带来新特性与性能提升，体现出其软件工具生态的持续成熟与竞争力。

items.title_en: Sweden goes back to basics, swapping screens for books in the classroom
items.title_zh: 瑞典在校内实验减少屏幕使用，课堂以书本取代屏幕
items.summary_en: Sweden experiments with reducing screen time in schools to emphasize traditional reading and critical thinking, exploring impacts on attention, literacy, and learning outcomes. The approach signals a broader debate on how much technology belongs in classrooms and how to balance digital fluency with foundational skills.
items.summary_zh: 瑞典在校内实验减少屏幕使用，强调传统阅读和批判性思维，评估对注意力、读写能力与学习成效的影响。这一举措折射出对课堂中科技使用的更广泛辩论，以及数字素养与基礎技能之间的平衡。

items.title_en: Qwen3.6-Plus: Towards real world agents
items.title_zh: Qwen3.6-Plus：迈向现实世界的智能代理
items.summary_en: Qwen3.6-Plus targets real-world agents, signaling a shift from pure chat to tool-enabled reasoning and action. The update likely improves grounding, reliability, and multi-step problem solving for practical tasks.
items.summary_zh: Qwen3.6-Plus 迈向现实世界的智能代理，体现从单纯对话型模型向工具使用和多步推理更稳健的转变。该更新大概率提升模型的落地性、稳定性，以及与外部工具的集成能力。

items.title_en: Artemis computer running two instances of MS outlook; they can't figure out why
items.title_zh: 阿提米斯 II 航天员发现两台 Outlook 实例在计算机上运行
items.summary_en: Astronauts on Artemis II report a computer running two Outlook instances, puzzling mission engineers. The anomaly underlines how even standard software can behave unpredictably in space-grade hardware and the need for robust debugging.
items.summary_zh: 阿提米斯 II 的航天员报告一台计算机上运行着两个 Outlook 实例，令任务工程师困惑。这一异常凸显在太空级硬件上普通软件也可能表现异常，需要更强的调试与排错能力。

items.title_en: Artemis II will use laser beams to live-stream 4K moon footage at 260 Mbps
items.title_zh: 阿提米斯 II 将用激光实现 4K 月球影像直播
items.summary_en: Artemis II will use laser communications to livestream 4K moon footage at 260 Mbps, a major upgrade over traditional radio links. The test showcases optical links’ potential to dramatically increase bandwidth for future crewed missions.
items.summary_zh: 阿提米斯 II 将通过激光通信以 260 Mbps 直播 4K 月球影像，较传统射频链路有明显提升。这一测试展示了光学链路在未来载人任务中大幅提升带宽的潜力。

items.title_en: Lemonade by AMD: a fast and open source local LLM server using GPU and NPU
items.title_zh: AMD 的 Lemonade：一个使用 GPU/NPU 的快速开源本地 LLM 服务器
items.summary_en: AMD's Lemonade project showcases a fast, open-source local LLM server that uses both GPUs and NPUs to run offline, private inference. By removing cloud dependencies, it aims to empower private AI workloads on consumer hardware, with implications for data control and customization.
items.summary_zh: AMD 的 Lemonade 项目是一个快速、开源的本地大语言模型服务器，利用 GPU 和 NPU 实现离线私有推理。它让在本地硬件上运行强大模型成为可能，提升数据隐私与定制化能力。

items.title_en: Delve allegedly forked an open-source tool and sold it as its own
items.title_zh: Delve 被指仿冒开源工具并以自有名义销售
items.summary_en: Tech media report that Delve, a troubled YC-backed startup, allegedly forked an open-source tool and sold it as its own. The controversy underscores ongoing tensions around licensing, attribution, and investor confidence in early-stage AI ventures.
items.summary_zh: Tech 圈报道显示备受争议的 YC 旗下初创公司 Delve 被指窃取开源工具并以自有产品在市场销售，此举反映出开源许可、署名以及投资者信心等方面的持续紧张关系。

items.title_en: Renewables reached nearly 50% of global electricity capacity last year
items.title_zh: 全球可再生能源约占电力容量的近一半
items.summary_en: Renewables reached nearly 50% of global electricity capacity last year, marking a pivotal shift in the energy mix. The milestone foregrounds challenges around grid integration, storage, and policy incentives needed to sustain the transition.
items.summary_zh: 去年全球可再生能源几乎占到全球电力容量的50%，标志着能源结构的重要转折。这一里程碑凸显了并网、储能以及维持转型所需的政策激励等挑战。

items.title_en: Good ideas do not need lots of lies in order to gain public acceptance (2008)
items.title_zh: 好点子并不需要大量谎言来获得公众认同（2008）
items.summary_en: A 2008 blog reflection argues that solid ideas don’t rely on deception to win traction, highlighting ethics and trust in business and communication. It explores how manipulative tactics can short-circuit genuine adoption, and why integrity matters for long-term success.
items.summary_zh: 2008 年的一篇博客反思认为，成熟的想法不需要谎言来赢得公众认同，强调商业与传播中的道德与信任。文章分析了操纵性手段如何短期带来效应，以及长期成功为何依赖诚信。

items.title_en: Steam on Linux Use Skyrocketed Above 5% in March
items.title_zh: Steam 在 Linux 的使用率于三月突破 5%
items.summary_en: Steam usage on Linux climbed past 5% in March, signaling growing gamer adoption on Linux platforms. Driven by Proton/Steam Deck and better driver support, this uptick could influence game porting decisions, driver development, and Linux ecosystem viability for gaming.
items.summary_zh: 三月 Linux 上 Steam 用户占比超过 5%，显示 Linux 平台的玩家采纳在增加。受 Proton/Steam Deck 和驱动支持改善推动，这一 uptick 可能影响游戏移植决策、驱动开发以及 Linux 的游戏生态可行性。

items.title_en: Amazon is adding a fuel surcharge to fees it collects from third-party sellers
items.title_zh: 亚马逊对第三方卖家收取燃料及物流附加费
items.summary_en: Amazon announces a 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge on seller fees, increasing operating costs for marketplace vendors and likely affecting pricing and margins. The move reflects rising shipping costs and geopolitical considerations that ripple through the platform's ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊宣布对第三方卖家征收3.5%的燃料与物流附加费，增加了市场卖家的运营成本，可能影响定价与利润率。这一举措反映了运输成本上升和地缘政治因素对平台生态的影响。

items.title_en: Post Mortem: axios NPM supply chain compromise
items.title_zh: Axios 的 NPM 供应链安全事件事后分析
items.summary_en: Axios experienced a supply-chain compromise on npm, with a malicious package version slipping into the ecosystem and executing unsafe code on install. The post-mortem outlines how the breach happened, the remediation steps taken, and key lessons for preventing future incidents.
items.summary_zh: Axios 遭遇 npm 供应链入侵，某个恶意版本在发布后被广泛使用并执行恶意代码。分析稿梳理了漏洞的成因、应对措施以及未来防护要点。

items.title_en: OpenAI Acquires TBPN
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN
items.summary_en: OpenAI expands its ecosystem by acquiring TBPN to bolster its AI tooling, content distribution, or research partnerships, signaling a broader strategy to weave external networks into its platform. The move could affect tooling access and collaboration for developers and researchers.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN，旨在扩展 AI 工具链、内容分发或研究合作网络，显示其在平台生态上的扩张策略。这一举措可能影响开发者与研究者的工具获取与协作方式。

items.title_en: Show HN: Made a little Artemis II tracker
items.title_zh: Show HN：做了一个小型的 Artemis II 跟踪器
items.summary_en: A tiny Artemis II tracker surfaces mission milestones and status updates for a public, hobbyist-friendly view of the spaceflight timeline. It shows how to package public mission data into a lightweight tracker.
items.summary_zh: 一个简易、易用的 Artemis II 跟踪器，提供任务里程碑、发射时间表以及状态更新，帮助公众直观跟进太空任务进展。展示了将公开任务数据打包成轻量前端的可能性。

items.title_en: Artemis II Launch Day Updates
items.title_zh: 阿尔忒弥斯 II 发射日现场更新
items.summary_en: NASA is providing live updates as Artemis II's launch day unfolds. The coverage typically includes countdown progress, weather delays, crew status, and mission objectives for Orion’s first crewed lunar loop since Apollo. This day marks a milestone for the Artemis program and human return to the Moon, with implications for future crewed missions and commercial partnerships.
items.summary_zh: 在阿尔忒弥斯 II 发射日，NASA 实时更新将持续揭示倒计时进展、天气状况、乘员情况及猎户座任务目标等要点。这标志着阿尔忒弥斯计划的一次重要里程碑，并对未来载人登陆月球与商业伙伴关系产生深远影响。

items.title_en: George Goble has died
items.title_zh: George Goble 去世
items.summary_en: George Goble, a recognized figure in computing, has died. Obituaries celebrate his contributions and lasting impact on the field.
items.summary_zh: 计算机领域知名人物 George Goble 去世，讣告纪念他对行业的贡献与影响。

items.title_en: Modern SQLite: Features You Didn't Know It Had
items.title_zh: 现代 SQLite：你不知道的特性
items.summary_en: SQLite now supports advanced features like JSON handling, UPSERT, WAL, and full-text search extensions, enabling richer queries on-device. A practical guide helps developers leverage these capabilities to build more capable offline apps with tiny dependencies.
items.summary_zh: SQLite 现已支持 JSON、UPSERT、WAL、全文检索等高级特性，使本地查询更强大。此文为开发者提供了利用这些能力构建离线应用的实用指南。

items.title_en: Inside Nepal's Fake Rescue Racket
items.title_zh: 揭露尼泊尔的假救援骗局
items.summary_en: Nepal's fake rescue racket exposed; scammers pose as legitimate emergency responders to solicit donations or payments. The piece analyzes methods, scale, and the impact on aid work, underscoring the need for watchdogs and safer donation channels.
items.summary_zh: 尼泊尔的假救援骗局被揭露，假扮紧急救援人员以敲诈捐款或费用。文章剖析此类骗局如何利用受害者脆弱性、运作渠道以及对加强监管和监督的呼吁。

items.title_en: Significant raise of reports
items.title_zh: 报告数量显著上升
items.summary_en: There’s a significant uptick in reports across the ecosystem, suggesting more disclosures or alerts being issued. The trend highlights growing transparency but also pressures teams to triage and respond quickly.
items.summary_zh: 生态系统中报告数量显著上升，指向更频繁的披露、审计或事件通知。这一趋势既提升透明度，也对团队的分流与应急响应造成更大压力。

items.title_en: 'Backrooms' and the Rise of the Institutional Gothic
items.title_zh: 《后室》与制度化哥特的崛起
items.summary_en: Examines the Backrooms meme as a lens on bureaucratic spaces and institutional power, connecting liminal online workspaces to gothic aesthetics. It argues these spaces reveal anxieties about institutions in the digital age.
items.summary_zh: 以《后室》这一网路迷因为镜头，分析其如何映射出官僚化空间与制度权力的美学。文章将数字时代对机构的焦虑与怪诞感联系起来，揭示新兴的制度哥特风格。

items.title_en: Yggdrasil Network
items.title_zh: 伊格德拉西尔网络
items.summary_en: Yggdrasil Network is a decentralized, end-to-end encrypted mesh network designed to route traffic without centralized nodes, offering privacy and censorship resistance. It aims to empower users with peer-to-peer routing and improved resilience against outages.
items.summary_zh: 伊格德拉西尔网络是一个去中心化、端对端加密的 mesh 网络，旨在实现无需中心节点的流量路由，提升隐私与抗审查能力。它为用户提供点对点路由与更强的抗 outages。

items.title_en: A Few Good Magazines From the 70s and 80s
items.title_zh: 70年代与80年代的好杂志
items.summary_en: A curated look at notable magazines from the 70s and 80s, highlighting the era's computing culture and design discourse. The collection provides historical context and inspiration for today's technologists.
items.summary_zh: 精选了70年代和80年代的几本重要杂志，聚焦当时的计算、设计与媒体文化。该合集为现代科技工作者提供历史脉络与灵感。

items.title_en: DRAM pricing is killing the hobbyist SBC market
items.title_zh: DRAM定价正在挤压爱好者级SBC市场
items.summary_en: Rising DRAM prices are squeezing the hobbyist SBC market, where memory is a core cost. As memory becomes a larger share of BOM, many affordable boards struggle on margins and demand. The shift could push makers toward leaner designs or pre-bundled solutions.
items.summary_zh: DRAM价格上涨挤压了爱好者级SBC市场，内存成本成为关键负担。随着内存占比上升，许多平价开发板的利润率和需求都被压缩。市场动荡可能促使厂商推出更节省内存的设计或打包解决方案。

items.title_en: IBM Announces Strategic Collaboration with Arm
items.title_zh: IBM 宣布与 Arm 的战略合作，共塑企业计算未来
items.summary_en: IBM partners with Arm to accelerate enterprise computing, focusing on AI, hybrid cloud, and scalable silicon ecosystems. The alliance could unlock Arm-based data center workloads and accelerate innovation in enterprise software, chip design, and ecosystem tooling.
items.summary_zh: IBM 与 Arm 建立战略合作，旨在加速企业计算，聚焦 AI、混合云与可扩展的芯片生态。此举可能推动基于 Arm 的数据中心工作负载，并推动企业软件、芯片设计与生态工具的创新。

items.title_en: EmDash – A spiritual successor to WordPress that solves plugin security
items.title_zh: EmDash：解决插件安全问题的 WordPress 精神续作
items.summary_en: EmDash positions itself as a security-focused successor to WordPress, redesigning plugin architecture to reduce attack surface and improve isolation. By reimagining plugin boundaries, it aims to deliver safer extensibility and better maintainability for developers and site owners.
items.summary_zh: EmDash 将自己定位为以安全为导向的 WordPress 继任者，通过重新设计插件架构与沙箱机制来降低攻击面并提升隔离性。其目标是在保留插件扩展能力的同时，提高站点的安全性与可维护性，适合注重安全的开发者与站点管理员。

items.title_en: Email obfuscation: What works in 2026?
items.title_zh: 电子邮件混淆：2026年的有效做法
items.summary_en: As automated scrapers get smarter, simple obfuscation like replacing characters is easily bypassed. A robust approach blends protocol protections (DMARC, SPF, DKIM) with thoughtful user experiences and risk-based email screening to reduce exposure.
items.summary_zh: 随着自动化抓取工具变得更智能，简单的混淆（例如替换字符）很容易被绕过。稳健的做法将域名认证（DMARC、SPF、DKIM）与用户体验设计和基于风险的邮箱筛查结合起来，以降低暴露面。

items.title_en: Memo: A language that remembers only the last 12 lines of code
items.title_zh: Memo：一种只记住最后 12 行代码的语言
items.summary_en: Memo is an esoteric language that forgets all but the last 12 lines of code, forcing programmers to reconsider context. The concept highlights how memory constraints shape programming style and language design.
items.summary_zh: Memo 是一种极简极客语言，只记住最近的 12 行代码，迫使程序员重新思考上下文和状态管理。它以玩笑式的方式探索记忆约束如何影响语言设计与编程风格。

items.title_en: A forecast of the fair market value of SpaceX's businesses
items.title_zh: SpaceX 业务公允价值的预测
items.summary_en: A forecast assesses the fair market value of SpaceX’s businesses, shedding light on how private space ventures could be valued amid evolving demand for launch, satellite, and space infrastructure. The analysis informs potential investors and strategic planning.
items.summary_zh: 对 SpaceX 业务的公允价值进行前瞻性预测，揭示在发射、卫星和太空基础设施需求变化之下，私营航天企业的估值方向。该分析为潜在投资者和战略规划提供参考。

items.title_en: Subscription bombing and how to mitigate it
items.title_zh: 订阅轰炸及其缓解方法
items.summary_en: Subscription bombing floods signup forms with automated signups, exhausting resources and sometimes disrupting campaigns. The takeaway is to deploy layered defenses: rate limiting, bot detection, CAPTCHAs, email verification, and anomaly monitoring to distinguish legitimate users from attackers.
items.summary_zh: 订阅轰炸用自动化注册淹没注册表，耗尽资源并可能干扰活动。应对策略应采取分层防护：限流、机器人检测、验证码、邮箱验证以及异常监测，区分真实用户和攻击者。

items.title_en: Bringing Clojure programming to Enterprise (2021)
items.title_zh: 将 Clojure 编程带入企业应用（2021）
items.summary_en: The piece explains how Clojure can fit into enterprise settings, tackling governance, tooling, and adoption hurdles. It also argues that Lisp on the JVM brings strengths in data processing, reliability, and composability for large-scale systems.
items.summary_zh: 文章讨论在企业环境中落地 Clojure 编程，聚焦工具链、治理和开发者采纳等挑战，同时强调 JVM 上 Lisp 的可扩展性和组合性带来的潜在收益。

items.title_en: The Weather Channel – RetroCast
items.title_zh: 气象频道推出 RetroCast 回顾系列
items.summary_en: RetroCast is a Weather Channel project that revisits historic weather events with modern analysis, offering context on climate trends and forecasting limits. It blends archived data with current methods to illustrate how weather understanding has evolved.
items.summary_zh: RetroCast 是气象频道的一项回顾系列，用现代分析重新探讨历史天气事件，提供对气候趋势和预报边界的解读。通过将往昔数据与现有方法结合，展示气象科学的演变与教训。

items.title_en: March heat in American west has left snowpack at record-low levels
items.title_zh: 美国西部三月高温致雪量创纪录低位
items.summary_en: March heat in the American West left snowpack at record-low levels, threatening water supply and increasing wildfire risk. Climate signals point to ongoing shifts in snow patterns, prompting shifts in drought management and reservoir planning.
items.summary_zh: 美国西部三月高温导致雪包量创纪录低位，威胁供水并提高野火风险。气候信号指向雪量模式的持续变化，推动干旱管理与水库规划的调整。

items.title_en: New laws to make it easier to cancel subscriptions and get refunds
items.title_zh: 新法律让取消订阅和退款更容易
items.summary_en: New consumer protection laws aim to simplify subscription cancellations and refunds, reducing friction for users and forcing vendors to adopt clearer cancellation flows. The change could impact SaaS onboarding, renewal practices, and dispute resolution.
items.summary_zh: 新出台的消费者保护法旨在简化取消订阅和退款流程，降低用户操作摩擦，要求商家采用更明确的取消机制。这将影响 SaaS 的注册、续订流程及纠纷解决方式。

items.title_en: The case for zero-error horizons in trustworthy LLMs
items.title_zh: 可信大型语言模型的零误差视界之路
items.summary_en: The paper argues for designing trustworthy LLMs with zero-error horizons, proposing evaluation and verification methods to bound hallucinations and errors in generated content. It discusses implications for enterprise deployment, safety guarantees, and user trust.
items.summary_zh: 论文提出为可信的大型语言模型设定“零错误视界”，通过评估与验证方法限制幻觉与错误，讨论对企业落地、安全保证与用户信任的影响。

items.title_en: SpaceX files to go public
items.title_zh: SpaceX 上市申请
items.summary_en: SpaceX files to go public, signaling a major tech IPO that could reshape aerospace funding dynamics, investor interest, and government contracting strategy around space ventures.
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 提交上市计划，预示着一次重要的科技股发行，可能改变航天领域的资金动力、投资者热度以及政府合同策略。

items.title_en: Quantum computing bombshells that are not April Fools
items.title_zh: 量子计算领域的重大突破，绝非愚人节玩笑
items.summary_en: Credible quantum computing breakthroughs have emerged, not jokes. The developments span qubit stability, error correction, or new hardware architectures that push toward practical quantum advantage. For technologists, these milestones sharpen timelines for cryptography, optimization, and scientific computing.
items.summary_zh: 可信的量子计算领域突破并非玩笑，涵盖量子比特稳定性、错误纠正和新型硬件架构等方面，推动实现实用化的量子优势。对于技术从业者，这些里程碑将重新校准对密码学、优化与科学计算的时间表。

items.title_en: Hugo's New CSS Powers
items.title_zh: Hugo 的新 CSS 功能
items.summary_en: Hugo, the static site generator, adds enhanced CSS tooling to streamline styling workflows and enable richer layouts with minimal JavaScript. The update broadens the toolset for developers who want modern visuals without bloated front-end dependencies.
items.summary_zh: 静态站点生成器 Hugo 增强了 CSS 工具链，简化样式工作流并在最少 JavaScript 的情况下实现更丰富的布局更新。此举为追求现代视觉效果的开发者提供了更强的原生支持与灵活性。

items.title_en: A new C++ back end for ocamlc
items.title_zh: Ocamlc 的 C++ 后端新实现
items.summary_en: A new C++ backend for the OCaml compiler backend (ocamlc) appears, enabling code generation or optimization paths using C++-based infrastructure. If realized, it could improve portability, performance, and interoperability between OCaml and C++ ecosystems, influencing language tooling and compiler design.
items.summary_zh: OCaml 编译器后端（ocamlc）新增了 C++ 后端，可能带来通过 C++ 基础设施进行代码生成与优化的路径。若落地，将提升可移植性与性能，并加强 OCaml 与 C++ 生态的互操作性，对语言工具链与编译器设计产生影响。

items.title_en: A $20/month user costs OpenAI $65 in compute. AI video is a money furnace
items.title_zh: 20 美元/月的用户成本其实要花 65 美元的计算成本？AI 视频是赚钱的炉子
items.summary_en: An analysis reveals that pricing consumers at $20/month for AI video services may still yield a high cost per user in compute, raising questions about profitability, monetization, and efficiency in AI-media offerings. It argues that video workloads drive costs far beyond subscriber fees.
items.summary_zh: 分析显示，尽管对 AI 视频服务定价为每月 20 美元，实际计算成本 per 用户却远高于此，凸显 AI 视频在成本与盈利模式上的挑战与机会。文章强调视频工作负载的高成本对商业模式的影响。

items.title_en: Artemis II's toilet is a moon mission milestone
items.title_zh: 阿尔忒弥斯二号任务的太空厕所成为月球任务的里程碑
items.summary_en: The on-board toilet is a key life-support component for crewed lunar missions, and its completion marks progress for Artemis II’s deep-space habitation needs. As NASA readies a crewed lunar orbit, practical conveniences like waste management underscore the engineering depth behind human spaceflight.
items.summary_zh: 机上厕所是载人月球任务生存系统的关键部分，完成标志着阿尔忒弥斯二号在深空驻留能力方面取得进展。随着任务进入月轨道阶段，对废物管理等实际需求的解决，凸显了人类深空飞行背后的工程深度。

items.title_en: Australia to crack down on gambling ads after years of criticism
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚将加强对赌博广告的监管，长期受批评
items.summary_en: Australia proposes tighter rules on gambling advertising, targeting placements near sports broadcasts and online channels, with stricter age-gating and disclosure requirements to protect vulnerable groups. The move could reshape ad-tech strategies for advertisers and sports leagues.
items.summary_zh: 澳大利亚拟对赌博广告设更严格的投放规则，重点监管体育赛事转播及在线渠道的广告，强化年龄分层与信息披露，以保护脆弱人群。这一举措可能改变广告技术与体育联盟的投放策略。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Who is hiring? (April 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：谁在招聘？（2026年4月）
items.summary_en: A lively thread aggregating April 2026 job openings across tech companies. It surfaces remote roles, compensation ranges, and in-demand skills, giving readers a snapshot of the current recruiting climate for engineers and developers.
items.summary_zh: 关于 2026 年 4 月的招聘信息讨论串，汇集了各家科技公司的岗位空缺、远程机会与薪资区间，提供对当前工程师招聘热度和技能需求的直观判断。

items.title_en: EmDash: A Fresh Take on CMS
items.title_zh: EmDash：全新视角的内容管理系统
items.summary_en: EmDash introduces a fresh CMS concept centered on structured content and developer-friendly workflows, challenging traditional CMS paradigms. The approach emphasizes content as data and aims to streamline authoring and delivery across channels.
items.summary_zh: EmDash 引入以结构化内容和开发者友好工作流为核心的新型内容管理系统，挑战传统 CMS 范式。该思路将内容视为数据，旨在简化跨渠道的创作与发布。

items.title_en: r/programming bans all discussion of LLM programming
items.title_zh: r/programming 禁止讨论 LLM 编程
items.summary_en: The programming subreddit bans discussion of LLM-based programming, citing policy considerations or quality concerns. The move highlights tensions between community governance and emerging AI tooling in developer discourse.
items.summary_zh: 程序员社区禁止讨论基于大模型的编程，出于政策或质量方面的考虑。这一举动凸显了社区治理与开发者讨论中对新兴 AI 工具之间的张力。

items.title_en: AI for American-produced cement and concrete
items.title_zh: 用于美国产水泥与混凝土的 AI
items.summary_en: Applying AI to US-made cement and concrete aims to optimize production, reduce waste, and lower emissions. The project discusses data-driven control across mixing, curing, and logistics, and its potential to strengthen the domestic construction supply chain.
items.summary_zh: 将人工智能应用于美国产水泥与混凝土，旨在优化生产、降低浪费并减少排放，覆盖拌合、养护和物流等环节的数据驱动控制。该方向对推动国内建筑材料供应链的可持续性与竞争力具有重要意义，同时也面临数据整合与工业落地的挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a DNS resolver from scratch in Rust – no DNS libraries
items.title_zh: Show HN：我用 Rust 从零构建了一个 DNS 解析器——不使用任何 DNS 库
items.summary_en: A hands-on demonstration building a DNS resolver from first principles in Rust, without using existing DNS libraries. The project highlights design decisions, safety considerations, and performance implications of implementing core networking protocols by hand.
items.summary_zh: 展示了用 Rust 从零实现 DNS 解析器的实作过程，未使用现成 DNS 库。该项目揭示核心网络协议的实现要点、安全性考量与性能取舍。

items.title_en: The Claude Code Leak
items.title_zh: Claude 代码泄露
items.summary_en: A leak of Claude's code surfaced, exposing internal design choices and potential security implications. The incident underscores the risks of sharing model internals and the importance of securing release artifacts and provenance.
items.summary_zh: Detected Claude 的代码泄露，暴露了内部设计选择和潜在的安全影响。这一事件凸显了共享模型内部实现的风险，以及对发布产物和来源可追溯性的重视。

items.title_en: Enabling Codex to Analyze Two Decades of Hacker News Data
items.title_zh: 让 Codex 能分析 Hacker News 两十年的数据
items.summary_en: By leveraging Codex to sift two decades of Hacker News content, the project uncovers long-term trends in tech topics, community sentiment, and the evolution of AI coverage on the site.
items.summary_zh: 利用 Codex 分析 Hacker News 两十年的数据，揭示技术主题的演变、社区动态，以及 AI 在社区话题中的演变趋势。

items.title_en: Show HN: A P2P messenger with dual network modes (Fast and Tor)
items.title_zh: Show HN: 具有快速与 Tor 双网络模式的 P2P 聊天工具
items.summary_en: A show-and-tell about a peer-to-peer messenger offering two networking modes—Fast for efficiency and Tor for anonymity—demonstrating a practical approach to privacy-respecting, decentralized messaging. It highlights design trade-offs between latency, anonymity, and resilience.
items.summary_zh: 一个演示项目展示了一个支持快速和 Tor 双网络模式的点对点通讯应用，体现了对隐私友好、去中心化通信的实践思路，并讨论了延迟、匿名性与韧性之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Attorney General Pam Bondi Out at DOJ
items.title_zh: Pam Bondi 离开 DOJ
items.summary_en: Pam Bondi steps down from her role at the Department of Justice, part of a broader leadership shuffle. The departure may influence the DOJ’s enforcement posture and provide signals about shifting political dynamics.
items.summary_zh: Pam Bondi 从司法部卸任，成为更大范围人事调整的一部分。此举或影响司法部的执法方向，并反映出政治格局的潜在变化。

items.title_en: StepFun 3.5 Flash is #1 cost-effective model for OpenClaw tasks (300 battles)
items.title_zh: StepFun 3.5 Flash：300 场对战中的 OpenClaw 任务成本效益第一的模型
items.summary_en: Benchmark results position StepFun 3.5 Flash as the most cost-effective model for OpenClaw tasks across 300 battles, delivering competitive performance at a fraction of the cost. The findings underscore the importance of cost-aware benchmarking in practical RL deployments.
items.summary_zh: 在 300 场对战的对比中，StepFun 3.5 Flash 被评为 OpenClaw 任务成本效益最高的模型，性能与成本之间达到更优平衡。这凸显在实际强化学习部署中进行成本意识对比的重要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Dull – Instagram Without Reels, YouTube Without Shorts (iOS)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Dull——iOS 上去除 Reels 的 Instagram 与 YouTube
items.summary_en: Dull is a minimal iOS app that strips short-form video features from Instagram and YouTube, aiming to reduce distraction and data usage. It spotlights a growing trend of niche, user-focused tools that redefine how we consume social media without changing the platforms themselves.
items.summary_zh: Dull 是一个简洁的 iOS 应用，去除了 Instagram 的 Reels 和 YouTube 的 Shorts，旨在降低干扰和数据消耗。这体现了用户聚焦、功能分离型工具在不改动原平台的情况下，重新定义信息获取方式的趋势。

items.title_en: ReactOS Shows Improved Stability and 64-Bit Support at Chemnitz Linux Days 2026
items.title_zh: ReactOS 在 Chemnitz Linux Days 2026 展示稳定性提升与 64 位支持
items.summary_en: ReactOS demo at Linux Days shows better stability and 64-bit support, signaling progress toward improved compatibility with Windows software. The update is relevant for enthusiasts tracking open-source alternatives to Windows.
items.summary_zh: 在 Chemnitz Linux Days 2026 上，ReactOS 展示了更好的稳定性和 64 位支持，显示其对 Windows 软件兼容性的持续改进。对关注开源替代 Windows 的爱好者具有重要意义。

items.title_en: Signing data structures the wrong way
items.title_zh: 错误签名数据结构的做法
items.summary_en: Signing whole data structures creates brittleness as schemas evolve and can invite replay risks. A better approach uses domain separation and stable serialization so signatures stay valid across versions. The post argues for principled design around what you sign, not simply signing everything.
items.summary_zh: 将整个数据结构签名会在架构变更时变得脆弱，且容易在重放攻击中产生风险。更好的做法是使用域分离、稳定的序列化与版本控制，使签名在不同版本下仍然有效。文章强调要在签名对象上做出清晰的边界定义，而非简单对整个结构签名。

items.title_en: Almighty Lisp: Lisp and Emacs Essentials Book
items.title_zh: 全能 Lisp：Lisp 与 Emacs 基础要点书
items.summary_en: A reference book delivering Lisp and Emacs essentials, likely covering core Lisp concepts, macros, and Emacs customization tips. It could be a handy resource for power users and students.
items.summary_zh: 一本覆盖 Lisp 与 Emacs 基本要点的参考书，涵盖核心 Lisp 概念、宏和 Emacs 定制技巧，适合进阶用户与学生使用。

items.title_en: Random numbers, Persian code: A mysterious signal transfixes radio sleuths
items.title_zh: 随机数、波斯码：神秘信号震撼无线电侦探
items.summary_en: A mysterious Persian-language numbers station message captivates radio sleuths, fueling speculation about coded espionage signals and the art of deciphering encrypted broadcasts.
items.summary_zh: 波斯语数字台传出神秘讯号，吸引无线电爱好者的关注，引发关于间谍信号及解码这类广播的猜测与讨论。

items.title_en: Jax's true calling: Ray-Marching renderers on WebGL
items.title_zh: Jax 的真正用途：在 WebGL 上实现光线行进渲染
items.summary_en: Introducing ray-marching renderers on WebGL with Jax demonstrates how differentiable programming and GPU acceleration can reshape browser-based rendering. It hints at new workflows for implicit surfaces and real-time exploration.
items.summary_zh: 在 WebGL 上用 Jax 实现光线行进渲染，展示了可微分编程和 GPU 加速在浏览器渲染中的应用潜力。此举可能推动隐函数表面的实时探索和新型渲染工作流。

items.title_en: IPv6 address, as a sentence you can remember
items.title_zh: 将 IPv6 地址记成一句话
items.summary_en: A mnemonic tool turns a long IPv6 address into a memorable sentence, making it easier to recall or share without errors. Such techniques underscore practical design for network operators and developers dealing with expansive address spaces.
items.summary_zh: 一种助记工具将冗长的 IPv6 地址变成易记的句子，方便记忆与分享，降低错误率。此类技术凸显在海量地址空间下，面向网络运维与开发者的实用设计。

items.title_en: Solar Balconies Take Europe by Storm
items.title_zh: 欧洲掀起太阳能阳台热潮
items.summary_en: Solar balconies are taking Europe by storm, enabling urban dwellers to generate power without roof access. The trend accelerates distributed energy, reduces grid strain, and highlights consumer-friendly paths to a greener cityscape.
items.summary_zh: 太阳能阳台在欧洲快速兴起，让城市居民在没有屋顶的情况下也能发电。此趋势推动分布式能源发展，缓解电网压力，并凸显面向用户友好的绿色城市路径。

items.title_en: Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise LiteLLM
items.title_zh: Mercor称遭遇网络攻击，疑因对开源 LiteLLM 项目被妥协有关
items.summary_en: Mercor says an attacker breached its systems via a compromise linked to the LiteLLM open-source project. The incident highlights how open-source model ecosystems can become a supply-chain vector, affecting downstream users and services.
items.summary_zh: Mercor 表示其系统遭到入侵，疑因对开源 LiteLLM 项目被妥协而引发。事件凸显开源模型生态可能成为供应链攻击向量，影响下游用户与服务。

items.title_en: Scientists crack a 20-year nuclear mystery behind the creation of gold
items.title_zh: 科学家破解黄金形成的20年核物理之谜
items.summary_en: Researchers solved a long-standing mystery about how gold is produced via nuclear processes, outlining the key reaction pathways in stellar environments. The finding deepens our understanding of heavy-element nucleosynthesis and informs astrophysics.
items.summary_zh: 20年的核物理之谜揭晓，阐明黄金在宇宙中的生成机理及相关核反应路径，提升对天体演化与元素合成的认识。研究采用实验与理论相结合，帮助解释为何黄金等重元素在星际环境中会形成。

items.title_en: Show HN: Flight-Viz – 10K flights on a 3D globe in 3.5MB of Rust+WASM
items.title_zh: Flight-Viz：用 Rust+WASM 在3D地球上显示1万班航班
items.summary_en: Flight-Viz renders 10,000 flights on a 3D globe in just 3.5MB using Rust and WebAssembly, showcasing impressive data visualization efficiency. It demonstrates how careful data encoding and streaming can unlock web-scale visuals in tight budgets.
items.summary_zh: Flight-Viz 在 3D 地球上用 3.5MB 的 Rust+WASM 展示了一万班次航班，展示了前端数据可视化的极致压缩与效率。通过高效的数据编码和流式加载实现大数据可视化的轻量化。

items.title_en: Fast and Gorgeous Erosion Filter
items.title_zh: 快速且华美的侵蚀滤镜
items.summary_en: A new erosion filter delivers fast performance with striking visual output, enabling real-time or near-real-time post-processing in graphics pipelines. The technique balances speed and quality, offering practical perks for artists and game studios working with large image sequences.
items.summary_zh: 一种新的侵蚀滤镜实现了快速性能与出色视觉效果的平衡，适用于实时或近实时的图像后处理，特别适合处理大量图像序列的艺术家与游戏工作室。

items.title_en: The beginning of programming as we'll know it?
items.title_zh: 我们熟知的编程将迎来新纪元？
items.summary_en: The article surveys how AI-assisted tools, higher-level abstractions, and new languages may redefine programming as we know it, pushing toward more automated, accessible software development. We may be at the dawn of a new era where humans collaborate with intelligent copilots to build software.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨了人工智能编程助手、抽象层级提升和新语言如何重塑我们熟知的编程，推动更自动化、可访问的软件开发。我们正处在一个新纪元的起点，人类将与智能助手共同构建软件。

items.title_en: The Windows equivalents of the most used Linux commands
items.title_zh: Windows 上最常用 Linux 命令的等效命令
items.summary_en: A cross-platform cheat sheet maps common Linux commands to their Windows equivalents, easing onboarding for developers migrating between systems. Quick references like ls → dir and grep → findstr save time and reduce friction.
items.summary_zh: 一份跨平台的速查表将常用 Linux 命令映射到 Windows 的等效命令，帮助在不同系统间迁徙的开发者更快上手。像 ls 对应 dir、grep 对应 findstr 等简洁对照，能显著提升效率。

items.title_en: Things I Think I Think... Preferring Local OSS LLMs
items.title_zh: Things I Think I Think... Preferring Local OSS LLMs
items.summary_en: A perspective on preferring locally hosted open-source LLMs over cloud offerings, citing privacy, control, and potential for customization as key drivers.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为在本地托管的开源大语言模型相比云端方案具有隐私、控制和可定制性的优势，是偏好本地方案的理由。

items.title_en: Gone (Almost) Phishin'
items.title_zh: 几乎消失的网络钓鱼攻击
items.summary_en: Phishing is evolving rather than disappearing, shifting toward more targeted and sophisticated social-engineering techniques. The author argues that stronger user education, tooling, and platform defenses are cutting into success rates even as attackers adapt.
items.summary_zh: 网络钓鱼并非消失，而是在向更具针对性和更高水准的社会工程学攻击演变。文章认为，改进的用户教育、工具和平台防护正在降低成功率，尽管攻击者仍在适应。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Who wants to be hired? (April 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：谁想被雇用？（2026年4月）
items.summary_en: A thread aggregating hiring demand across regions and roles, revealing where developers are in demand and what comp companies are seeking. It offers signal for job seekers and recruiters alike.
items.summary_zh: 该话题聚焦于当前的雇佣需求与岗位偏好，提供对求职者和雇主的市场信号。让读者了解在哪些区域和技能最受追捧。

items.title_en: Trinity Large Thinking
items.title_zh: Trinity：大型思维
items.summary_en: Trinity presents a framework for coordinating large-language models to perform structured, multi-step thinking, improving problem solving and planning. It leverages orchestration among tools and agents to handle complex tasks more reliably.
items.summary_zh: Trinity 提出了一套协调大模型进行结构化、分步式推理的框架，可提升问题求解与规划能力。通过对工具和代理的编排，更可靠地处理复杂任务。

items.title_en: The future of code search is not regex – 100x faster than ripgrep
items.title_zh: 代码搜索的未来不是正则表达式——比 ripgrep 快 100x
items.summary_en: Code search is moving beyond regex toward semantic search with embeddings, achieving speeds purportedly 100x faster than ripgrep. The approach enables context-aware, language-agnostic queries and better scaling for large repos.
items.summary_zh: 代码搜索正在从正则走向基于嵌入向量的语义搜索，据称比 ripgrep 快100倍。该方法支持上下文感知、语言无关的查询，并更适合对大规模代码库的扩展。

items.title_en: Show HN: NASA Artemis II Mission Timeline Tracker
items.title_zh: Show HN：NASA Artemis II 任务时间线追踪器
items.summary_en: A lightweight, open-source timeline tracker visualizes Artemis II milestones, making complex mission schedules accessible to enthusiasts and engineers alike. It demonstrates the value of public-facing tooling for high-profile space programs.
items.summary_zh: 一个轻量级、开源的时间线追踪器直观展示 Artemis II 的里程碑，使爱好者和工程师都能更清晰地了解复杂任务日程。此类公开工具显示了在高关注度太空项目中的重要性。

items.title_en: C89cc.sh – standalone C89/ELF64 compiler in pure portable shell
items.title_zh: C89cc.sh——用纯可移植 Shell 实现的 C89/ELF64 独立编译器
items.summary_en: A standalone C89/ELF64 compiler written entirely in portable shell demonstrates how far a self-contained toolchain can go with shell scripting. It showcases clever scripting tricks and serves as a thought experiment, not a practical GCC replacement.
items.summary_zh: 一个用纯可移植 Shell 实现的 C89/ELF64 独立编译器，展示了通过 shell 脚本也能构建完整工具链的极限。它凸显了脚本技巧的巧思，更多地作为思维实验，而非生产环境的替代品。

items.title_en: SolveSpace (open source 2D/3D CAD) working on Windows 2000 (2025)
items.title_zh: SolveSpace（开源 2D/3D CAD）在 Windows 2000 上工作（2025）
items.summary_en: SolveSpace, an open-source CAD tool, reportedly runs on Windows 2000 in 2025, showing remarkable legacy-support and community effort. This raises considerations for backward compatibility, developer maintenance, and the longevity of open-source software.
items.summary_zh: 开源的 SolveSpace CAD 工具在 2025 年仍能在 Windows 2000 上运行，展示了社区对向后兼容的坚持与努力。这引发了对向后兼容、维护工作量及开源软件寿命的思考。

items.title_en: Show HN: Git bayesect – Bayesian Git bisection for non-deterministic bugs
items.title_zh: Show HN: Git bayesect—用于非确定性缺陷的贝叶斯二分定位
items.summary_en: Git bayesect applies Bayesian reasoning to Git bisect, helping locate flaky/non-deterministic bugs when traditional bisect stalls. It guides the search with probabilistic updates, potentially saving triage time.
items.summary_zh: Git bayesect 使用贝叶斯推理来处理非确定性缺陷的回溯问题，当传统的二分回溯在测试不稳定时难以定位时尤为有用。通过对提交的概率更新引导搜索，可以缩短定位时间。

items.title_en: Show HN: CLI to order groceries via reverse-engineered REWE API (Haskell)
items.title_zh: Show HN：通过反向工程的 REWE API 下单的 CLI（Haskell）
items.summary_en: An open-source CLI that orders groceries by calling a reverse-engineered REWE API, implemented in Haskell. It showcases how API discovery and type-safe scripting can automate mundane tasks, while raising questions about reliability and compliance of reverse-engineered interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 一个用反向工程的 REWE API 的命令行下单工具，使用 Haskell 编写。展示类型安全脚本化与自动化购物的可能性，同时也提及反向工程接口的合规与稳定性问题。

items.title_en: Intuiting Pratt Parsing
items.title_zh: 直观理解 Pratt 解析
items.summary_en: Pratt parsing is a practical, top-down parsing approach that handles expressions with operator precedence using binding power. It gives you clean, fast parsers and precise control over syntax, useful for language front-ends and DSLs.
items.summary_zh: Pratt 解析法是一种实用的表达式解析技术，结合自顶向下语法与运算符优先级的处理。它实现简单、速度快，适合语言前端和领域专用语言的实现。

items.title_en: Windows 95 defenses against installers that overwrite a file with an older one
items.title_zh: Windows 95 针对覆盖旧文件的安装程序的防御
items.summary_en: Windows 95 implemented defenses to prevent installers from downgrading files by overwriting with older versions, a primitive form of software integrity protection. The post recounts historical context and lessons for modern update safety.
items.summary_zh: Windows 95 为阻止安装程序用旧版本覆盖新文件的行为设计了防护，属于早期软件完整性保护的雏形。文章回顾历史并提炼出对现代更新安全的启示。

items.title_en: JSON Canvas Spec (2024)
items.title_zh: JSON Canvas 规范
items.summary_en: A proposed JSON Canvas Spec aims to standardize how graphics scenes are described in JSON, enabling cross-platform rendering without bespoke formats. If adopted, it could simplify real-time graphics streaming and interoperability across apps and devices.
items.summary_zh: 一项关于 JSON Canvas 的拟议规范旨在标准化通过 JSON 描述图形场景的方式，以实现跨平台渲染并避免自定义格式。若被采纳，可能简化实时图形传输与跨应用、跨设备的互操作性。

items.title_en: What Gödel Discovered (2020)
items.title_zh: 哥德尔所发现的是什么（2020）
items.summary_en: The post revisits Gödel’s incompleteness insights and their relevance to modern computation and AI. It argues that even formal systems have limits, shaping how we think about provability, consistency, and automated reasoning.
items.summary_zh: 文章回顾了哥德尔的不完备性以及它们在现代计算和人工智能中的相关性。指出即使是形式系统也有极限，这影响我们对可证明性、一致性与自动推理的理解。

items.title_en: The revenge of the data scientist
items.title_zh: 数据科学家的逆袭
items.summary_en: Data scientists regain influence as tooling, data access, and governance improve, enabling repeatable experimentation and faster insight. The piece argues that data teams are back at the center of ML product development.
items.summary_zh: 随着数据基础设施、数据访问和治理能力的提升，数据科学家重新在 ML 项目中取得核心地位。文章主张通过端到端的工作流与可重复实验来提高影响力。

items.title_en: Significant progress made on Xbox 360 recompilation
items.title_zh: Xbox 360 重编译工作取得重要进展
items.summary_en: Developers are reporting substantial advances in recompiling Xbox 360 titles for modern hardware, enabling improved performance, bug fixes, and potential preservation avenues for classic games. The effort highlights the enduring interest in game preservation and reverse-engineering communities.
items.summary_zh: 开发者在将 Xbox 360 作品重新编译到现代硬件方面取得显著进展，提升性能、修复漏洞，并为经典游戏的保存开辟可能性。这一努力凸显了游戏保留与逆向工程社区的持续热情。

items.title_en: Emacs-libgterm: Terminal emulator for Emacs using libghostty-vt
items.title_zh: Emacs-libgterm：基于 libghostty-vt 的 Emacs 终端模拟器
items.summary_en: Emacs-libgterm brings terminal emulation to Emacs via libghostty-vt, enabling robust interactive shells and terminal apps inside the editor. This reduces external terminal switches and benefits developers who rely on REPLs or TUI tools.
items.summary_zh: Emacs-libgterm 通过 libghostty-vt 将终端仿真引入 Emacs，使编辑器内可使用强大的互动式 shell 与终端应用。减少了切换外部终端的需求，提升对 REPL 与文本界面工具的支持。

items.title_en: Reverse Engineering Crazy Taxi, Part 2
items.title_zh: 反向工程 Crazy Taxi，第二部分
items.summary_en: This second installment detail reverse-engineering steps for Crazy Taxi, exploring ROM structure, asset extraction, and emulation techniques. It highlights how classic games can be preserved and studied outside official tooling.
items.summary_zh: 第二部分介绍对 Crazy Taxi 的反向工程步骤，涵盖 ROM 结构、资源提取和仿真技术。展示了如何在非官方工具环境下对经典游戏进行保存与研究。

items.title_en: Built a cheap DIY fan controller because my motherboard never had working PWM
items.title_zh: 自制便宜的DIY 风扇控制器，因为主板 PWM 功能失效
items.summary_en: A hardware tinkerer built an inexpensive DIY fan controller to compensate for non-working motherboard PWM.
items.summary_zh: 作者为主板 PWM 不工作的问题自制了一个低成本的 DIY 风扇控制器。文中介绍电路设计、元件选择以及带来的散热控制改进。

items.title_en: Set the Line Before It's Crossed
items.title_zh: 在越界前设定底线
items.summary_en: A provocative take argues for predefining ethical and safety boundaries before deployment. It advocates concrete governance levers and guardrails to prevent irreversible harm as tech scales, rather than firefighting after the fact.
items.summary_zh: 本文主张在部署前就先设定伦理与安全边界，倡导通过具体的治理手段和防护措施来避免不可逆的风险扩散，而非事后才急忙应对。

items.title_en: Prefer do notation over Applicative operators when assembling records (2024)
items.title_zh: 在组装记录时优先使用 do 记法而非 Applicative 运算符（2024）
items.summary_en: A Haskell-focused discussion arguing that do-notation yields clearer, more maintainable code when assembling records than using Applicative operators. It provides examples and rationale for stylistic preference.
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于 Haskell 的文章主张在组装记录时应优先使用 do 记法，而非使用 Applicative 运算符，因为前者在可读性和可维护性上更优。给出示例和理由。

items.title_en: Maze Algorithms (1997)
items.title_zh: 迷宫算法（1997）
items.summary_en: A historic collection of maze algorithms from 1997, including generation and solving techniques with diagrams. It serves as a snapshot of early algorithmic thinking in pathfinding and a handy reference for education.
items.summary_zh: 收录1997年的迷宫生成与求解算法，配有示意图。它是早期路径搜索思想的历史镜像，也是教育与回顾的有用资料。

items.title_en: Reinventing the pull request
items.title_zh: 重新设计 Pull Request 流程
items.summary_en: Argues for rethinking PRs to streamline code review, proposes alternatives or tooling to reduce cognitive load and bottlenecks; emphasizes better integration with CI, tests, and defined review scopes.
items.summary_zh: 提出重新设计 Pull Request 的思路，力求简化代码评审，给出替代方法或工具以降低认知负担和瓶颈；强调与持续集成、测试以及明确的评审范围的更好整合。

items.title_en: Ariane 6 user's manual [pdf]
items.title_zh: Ariane 6 用户手册（PDF）
items.summary_en: The Ariane 6 user manual provides technical guidance for mission planning, payload integration, and safety procedures for the European rocket program. It’s a valuable reference for engineers and managers coordinating European launch campaigns.
items.summary_zh: Ariane 6 用户手册提供任务规划、载荷集成与安全程序等技术指导，适用于参与欧洲火箭计划的工程师与管理人员。

items.title_en: Magic the Gathering Deck Shuffler
items.title_zh: 魔法风云会牌组洗牌器
items.summary_en: A web-based deck shuffler for Magic: The Gathering that models probability and order statistics, helping players experiment with deck-building strategies and calculate odds. It’s a practical tool for players who enjoy deep combinatorics in gameplay.
items.summary_zh: 一个在线牌组洗牌工具，帮助玩家计算概率、排序等统计，便于探索牌组构筑策略并在游戏中进行深度组合分析。

items.title_en: Foxing aspires to be an eBPF-powered replication engine for Linux filesystems
items.title_zh: Foxing 旨在成为一个基于 eBPF 的 Linux 文件系统复制引擎
items.summary_en: Foxing aims to use eBPF to track and replicate filesystem changes efficiently, enabling near real-time replication and advanced backup workflows. The project could reshape how backups, snapshots, and disaster recovery work on Linux, but it must prove stability and safety in kernel-level tooling.
items.summary_zh: Foxing 打算利用 eBPF 追踪并高效复制文件系统变更，支持近实时复制与高级备份工作流。该项目可能改变 Linux 备份、快照与灾难恢复的实现方式，但在内核级工具的稳定性与安全性方面还需验证。

items.title_en: An Example of Statistical Investigation of the Text Eugene Onegin – Markov, 1913 [pdf]
items.title_zh: 《叶甫盖尼·奥涅金》文本的马尔可夫统计分析（1913）
items.summary_en: A 1913 study uses Markov models to statistically analyze Eugene Onegin, showcasing early applications of probabilistic methods to literature. The work illustrates how simple stochastic processes can reveal stylistic and structural signals in classic texts.
items.summary_zh: 1913 年的一项研究使用马尔可夫模型对《叶甫盖尼·奥涅金》进行统计分析，展示了概率方法在文学中的早期应用。该研究揭示了简单的随机过程如何揭露经典文本的风格与结构信号。

items.title_en: Queueing Requests Queues Your Capacity Problems, Too
items.title_zh: 排队请求也暴露了你的容量问题
items.summary_en: Queueing requests helps absorb bursts of traffic and decouple services, but it also introduces latency and complexity. The piece surveys backpressure patterns and practical strategies for capacity-aware design.
items.summary_zh: 排队请求有助于缓解峰值负载、避免容量压力直接击穿，但也可能带来延迟和实现复杂性。文中介绍了缓冲、背压以及分布式系统容量规划的实用模式。

items.title_en: Quadratic Micropass Type Inference
items.title_zh: 二次微遍推断类型系统
items.summary_en: A study on quadratic micropass type inference explores how small, incremental inference steps can determine types efficiently. The work has implications for lean compiler pipelines and practical language design.
items.summary_zh: 一项关于二次微遍推断类型的研究探讨了通过微小的增量推断步骤高效地确定类型的方法，对精简编译器流水线和实用语言设计具有启发。

items.title_en: The Joy of Numbered Streets
items.title_zh: 编号街道的乐趣
items.summary_en: The post argues that numbered streets simplify navigation and transit planning, but names carry culture and history. The post weighs the trade-offs between clarity and character in urban design.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为编号街道有助于导航和公共交通的路径规划，但街道名则承载历史与地域文化。讨论了城市设计在清晰性、记忆性与文化之间的权衡。
